highlights: Special characters (| \ @ { } [ ] and umlauts) now type correctly in remote sessions
Choose the keyboard layout per device (German by default)
Clipboard copy & paste now works in both directions in RDP and VNC sessions
On-demand Sync button per cloud in the VM Fleet
VM Fleet refreshes automatically after Start/Stop/Restart
Accurate "last synced" time (when last checked, not just last changed)
